message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam componentStyle rectangle

rectangle "Executor" as Executor1
rectangle "Reactor" as Reactor1

Executor1 -> Reactor1 : 当前类型为pending
note right: 轮询其他future
Reactor1 --> Executor1 : 执行对于的wake方法将Future的状态变为就绪（Ready）

rectangle "Executor" as Executor2
rectangle "Reactor" as Reactor2

@enduml
```
